steps.title: Inspect RC output node
steps.student_question: Why is this the output node?
steps.expected_reasoning: Use transient_or_ac reasoning around components [R1, C1] and nodes [n_out]. Explain the physical quantity before computing it.
steps.reveal_hint: Name the component, node, or physical quantity first; then relate it to KCL/KVL, impedance, or energy storage.
steps.common_mistake: Jumping to a numeric answer before checking polarity, units, or the measured node.
fact_lines: Known values: R1 = 1 kOhm; C1 = 1 uF
